protected_groups.transitional_note: Agent readiness, model topology, and provider health diagnostics are provider-read admin surfaces.
Scenario durable baseline endpoints are authenticated-user scoped; evaluation remains separately non-persistent.
Consumer stock structure diagnostics are authenticated-user scoped and not public.
Stock research, import, and history routes are authenticated-member surfaces; only the quote route is explicitly public.
Options fixture/demo analysis is member-gated by route-local dependency; production Options decisioning still requires accepted real-provider evidence.
Leveraged ETF observation tooling is scoped to the authenticated Watchlist workflow.
Scenario evaluation is an authenticated-member research surface.
Capability is discoverable through a wrapper helper that also enforces recent admin reauthentication.
Professional data capability inventory is provider-read admin gated and not public.
Deprecated hidden provider-fit diagnostic route under the market namespace; capability-gated and not public-safe.
Operator market diagnostics remain available to provider-read admins and are no longer anonymous consumer surfaces.

public_samples.transitional_note: Guest-safe route may consume optional user context but must not be relabeled as admin-only.
Guest-safe route must remain outside admin-only capability mapping.
Public auth status probe should not silently become protected.

Root Swagger UI is gated by api.app._require_docs_admin_user when auth is enabled; when auth is disabled it is available only in non-production environments and fails closed with HTTP 403 in production.

Root OpenAPI schema is app-level and guarded by api.app._require_docs_admin_user when auth is enabled; when auth is disabled it is available only in non-production environments and fails closed with HTTP 403 in production.
Root ReDoc is gated by api.app._require_docs_admin_user when auth is enabled; when auth is disabled it is available only in non-production environments and fails closed with HTTP 403 in production.
